arts.ttl: 5 reasons Bayer Leverkusen will beat Inter Milan: Wirtz's wizardry, Schick's scoring streak and Alonso's European record
arts.sum: In their record-breaking 2023/24 season, they won 14 of their 17 home games, dropping points on just three occasions and scoring 44 goals across those wins. Schick is also unbeaten against upcoming opponents Inter, drawing two and winning one of his encounters with them during his time at Roma in Serie A, whilst also scoring once across those games.
